title: Practitioner Complaints - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Practitioner Complaints 6 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists the public by identifying and regulating the practice of licensed professional counselors and licensed marriage and family therapists. Investigates complaints regarding violations of the law and rules, and the competency of licensees. Issues new and renewed licenses, disciplines misconduct, and communicates information about licensure, practice, and discipline. Develops and maintains professional standards for the professions of professional counseling and marriage and family therapy. 3218 Pringle Road SE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-5499 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON BOARD OF PSYCHOLOGY BOARD OF PSYCHOLOGY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and resources about the topic of psychology. Individuals may apply for licenses, seek information about exams, license renwal, or continuing education. Also provides a way to verify licenses and file complaints against practioners. 3218 Pringle Road SE Suite 130 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-4154 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON STATE HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Regulates and ensures compliance with standards for health-related professions in Oregon. It oversees athletic trainers, body piercers, cosmetologists, denture technicians, midwives, environmental health specialists, hearing aid specialists, and respiratory therapists. The website provides a directory of licensed professionals and offers online license renewal services. 1430 Tandem Avenue NE Suite 180 Salem, OR 973011287 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4:30pm, Tuesday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 378-8667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON MEDICAL BOARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about medical doctors, doctors of osteopathic medicine, physician assistants, acupuncturists, and podiatric physicians. Information provided at no charge includes date first licensed in Oregon and verification of current licensure and status. Public may search board database online to obtain a licensee educational history, and any disciplinary actions or malpractice claims finalized against a licensee. Board handles complaints about licensees, license applications and renewals. If Board cannot address the needs for the complaint, the Complaint Resource Officer may be able to provide referrals to the appropriate agency or organization. 1500 SW 1st Avenue Suite 620 Portland, OR 972015847 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (971) 673-2700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON PATIENT SAFETY COMMISSION EARLY DISCUSSION AND RESOLUTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a method to make complaints about mistreatment at health care facilities outside of the legal system using the Early Discussion and Resolution (EDR) process. A resolution may include an apology, answers to questions, improvements to care, or compensation. Qualifying events must have taken place in the state of Oregon on or after July 1, 2014. Eligibility: Individuals (or their representative) who experienced care at a healthcare facility or involving a healthcare provider that resulted in serious physical injury or death Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 928-6158 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BOARD OF NURSING STATE BOARD OF NURSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Determines licensure and certification requirements, interprets the Oregon Nurse Practice Act, maintains lists of approved Oregon nursing educational programs, evaluates and approves nursing and nursing assistant programs, issues licenses and renewals, investigates complaints and takes disciplinary action against licensees who violate the Oregon Nurse Practice Act, maintains the nursing assistant registry, and provides testimony to the legislature and other organizations as needed. 17938 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Portland, OR 97224 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (971) 673-0685 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS BOARD OF LICENSED PROFESSIONAL COUNSELORS AND THERAPISTS OREGON BOARD OF PSYCHOLOGY BOARD OF PSYCHOLOGY OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION HEALTH LICENSING OFFICE OREGON MEDICAL BOARD OREGON MEDICAL BOARD OREGON STATE BOARD OF NURSING STATE BOARD OF NURSING
